name: refactor-agent
description: Refactor Agent – rename symbols via A2A (Python or TypeScript). Standalone sidebar panel.

commands.title: Refactor Agent: Open Webview Developer Tools

authentication.label: Refactor Agent
authentication.description: Sign in with Refactor Agent (GitHub App)

refactorAgent.a2aBaseUrl.description: A2A server base URL (e.g. http://localhost:9999 or https://refactor-agent.example.com)

refactorAgent.syncUrl.description: Sync service URL. When empty, uses A2A base URL (same for hosted Cloud Run).

refactorAgent.apiKey.description: Optional API key for hosted A2A (sent as Authorization: Bearer <key>)

refactorAgent.engine.description: Language engine (must match opened workspace; set by try_extension.sh <playground>).

refactorAgent.accessRequestUrl.description: URL for requesting access when status is pending (shown in onboarding message).

refactorAgent.authSignInUrl.description: URL for signing in (e.g. https://refactorum.com/auth/signin). When empty, derived from accessRequestUrl.

refactorAgent.sentryDsn.description: Sentry DSN for error reporting. Leave empty to disable.

refactorAgent.authRegisterDeviceUrl.description: URL for device flow registration. Used when signing in with device code.
